クラス PrimordialJadeWingedSpear

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Weapon
model.weapon.PrimordialJadeWingedSpear
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect
public class PrimordialJadeWingedSpear extends Weapon implements DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect
Primordial Jade Winged-Spear (5-star Polearm).

Base stats (Lv 90): 674 Base ATK, 22.1% CRIT Rate (substat).

Eagle Spear of Justice (R1):

  • On hit: gain a Eagle Spear of Justice stack (+3.2% ATK per stack), max 7 stacks. Stack gain has a 0.3 s cooldown.
  • All stacks expire if no hit occurs within 6 s of the last hit.
  • At max 7 stacks: additionally gain +12% All DMG Bonus.

  • コンストラクタの概要

    説明
    PrimordialJadeWingedSpear()
     

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    void
    applyPassive(StatsContainer stats, double currentTime)
    Stack bonuses (+3.2% ATK per stack, +12% All DMG at 7 stacks) are applied via the "Eagle Spear of Justice" Buff registered in onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator), ensuring visibility in the Active Buffs report.
    void
    onDamage(Character user, AttackAction action, double currentTime, CombatSimulator sim)
    On each damage instance: If the gap since the last hit is ≥ 6 s, all stacks are reset to 0. If the 0.3 s stack-gain cooldown has elapsed and stacks are below max, gain 1 stack. Re-registers the "Eagle Spear of Justice" Buff on the owner character with a refreshed 6 s expiration window so it appears in the Active Buffs report.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド Weapon

    getBaseAtk, getExpectedNAEnergyPerHit, getName, getStats, getWeaponType

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • PrimordialJadeWingedSpear

      public PrimordialJadeWingedSpear()

  • メソッドの詳細

    • onDamage

      public void onDamage(Character user, AttackAction action, double currentTime, CombatSimulator sim)
      On each damage instance:
      1. If the gap since the last hit is ≥ 6 s, all stacks are reset to 0.
      2. If the 0.3 s stack-gain cooldown has elapsed and stacks are below max, gain 1 stack.
      3. Re-registers the "Eagle Spear of Justice" Buff on the owner character with a refreshed 6 s expiration window so it appears in the Active Buffs report.
      定義:
      onDamage インタフェース内 DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect

    • applyPassive

      public void applyPassive(StatsContainer stats, double currentTime)
      Stack bonuses (+3.2% ATK per stack, +12% All DMG at 7 stacks) are applied via the "Eagle Spear of Justice" Buff registered in onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator), ensuring visibility in the Active Buffs report.
      オーバーライド:
      applyPassive クラス内 Weapon
      パラメータ:
      stats - the stats container to mutate in-place
      currentTime - simulation time in seconds (for time-gated passives)
